hooks.command:
bash -c 'stale=$(git branch -vv 2>/dev/null | grep ": gone]" | sed "s/^[* ]*/  /" | cut -d" " -f3); orphans=$(git worktree list 2>/dev/null | grep -v "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)$" | sed "s/^/  /"); msg=""; if [ -n "$stale" ]; then msg="Stale branches (remote deleted):
$stale"; fi; if [ -n "$orphans" ]; then [ -n "$msg" ] && msg="$msg
"; msg="${msg}Active worktrees:
$orphans"; fi; if [ -n "$msg" ]; then echo -e "Git cleanup check:
$msg
Run gclean to remove stale branches."; fi'

bash -c 'log="./scripts/.session-cost.log"; [ -f "$log" ] || exit 0; n=$(awk -F"|" "{ gsub(/^[ \t]+|[ \t]+$/, \"\", \$5); if (\$5 == \"\") c++ } END { print c+0 }" "$log"); if [ "$n" -ge 3 ]; then echo "$n ungraded sessions in .session-cost.log — run /grade-session to backfill."; fi'

bash -c 'cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "^git commit|&& git commit|; git commit"; then branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); for b in main master develop staging production; do if [ "$branch" = "$b" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Cannot commit to protected branch '"'"'$branch'"'"'. Create a feature branch first."; exit 2; fi; done; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'if [ "$CLAUDE_ALLOW_PAYMENTS" = "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "stripe\.com|stripe-cli|@stripe/|x402[./]|@x402/|browserbase|parallel\.ai|tempo\.xyz"; then echo "BLOCKED: Machine-payment command detected (stripe/x402/browserbase/parallel.ai/tempo). Set CLAUDE_ALLOW_PAYMENTS=1 for this session to bypass — review the command first."; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'filepath=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$filepath" | grep -qE "/.claude/agents/|/.claude/skills/|/config/skills/"; then [ -z "$SECOND_BRAIN_HOME" ] && exit 0; S="$(find "$SECOND_BRAIN_HOME/repos" -path "*/macbook-dev-setup/scripts/sync-agentic.sh" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1)"; [ -z "$S" ] && exit 0; "$S" "$SECOND_BRAIN_HOME" --type workspace >/dev/null 2>&1; find "$SECOND_BRAIN_HOME/repos" -name ".claude" -type d -exec dirname {} \; 2>/dev/null | while read -r d; do "$S" "$d" >/dev/null 2>&1; done; echo "Synced agentic symlinks to all projects"; fi'
